items.claim: Nurullo Aliev doesn't really score all that well and is a decision machine who is not the most dangerous guy going.
items.quote: he hasn't really scored that well in the past anyway. Not the most dangerous guy going, right? He's a decision machine.

items.claim: Sam Patterson averages over 100 DraftKings points in wins.
items.quote: Averaging over 100 DraftKings points in wins, that's pretty impressive.

items.claim: Magomed Ankalaev doesn't typically score all that well and has only broken 100 points three times in his UFC career.
items.quote: he doesn't typically score all that well, right? We're can't really find too many instances where he's broken 100 points. He's done it three times throughout a pretty long UFC career.

items.claim: Valter Walker has been crushing lately with high scores of 98, 122, and 97.9.
items.quote: Valter Walker, who has just crushed, right? 98, 122, 97.9. Been crushing lately.

items.claim: Vagayev is not somebody who finishes fights all that often.
items.quote: Vagayev as well. Just not somebody who finishes fights all that often.

items.claim: Steve Erceg has never broken 100 DraftKings points in three-round fights.
items.quote: Steve Erceg never broke 100 DraftKings points. And we see in like three round fights like this is good 90 points
